Login.subtitle: Sign in to FEPS Events System

Report.faculty: Faculty of Economics and Political Science
Report.summaryPrefix: This report summarizes the events and activities scheduled for
Report.description: The following is a comprehensive ledger of academic and institutional events registered within the Faculty Information System. This document serves as an official record for administrative and managerial review.
Report.noEvents: No events recorded for this period.
Report.footer: Official Document - Faculty of Economics and Political Science - Generated automatically

EventsPage.pageDescription: Keep track of all conferences, seminars, workshops, and student activities organized by the faculty.

EventDetail.downloadFallback: If the preview does not load, you can download the file directly.
EventDetail.draftPreview: Draft Preview: This event is currently unpublished. You are viewing it because you are an Admin.

AdminEvents.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this event?
AdminEvents.pageDesc: Create, edit, publish, and delete faculty events and academic sessions.
AdminEvents.formDescPlaceholder: Additional description or details about the event...
AdminEvents.publishDesc: If checked, this event will be visible to everyone on the calendar.

AdminReports.pageDesc: Generate official institutional documents and view event analytics.
AdminReports.generateDesc: Export a formal PDF report of scheduled events for institutional records.

Tour.homeNavDesc: Welcome to the FEPS Events Hub. Use this bar to navigate the site.
Tour.homeStatsContent: See the total number of active events and upcoming seminars at a glance.
Tour.homeFeedContent: Scroll through the most recent and highlighted upcoming events.
Tour.homeLangContent: Instantly switch the interface language between English, Arabic, and French.
Tour.eventsCalendarContent: Browse through the faculty's events visually month by month.
Tour.eventsSearchContent: Type keywords to quickly find specific events or seminars.
Tour.eventsFiltersContent: Filter the directory by specific event types like Workshops, Seminars, or Cultural events.
Tour.adminSidebarContent: Navigate between events management, reports, and user access controls.
Tour.adminCreateContent: Click here to add a new academic event, upload an agenda, and set locations.
Tour.adminPublishContent: Instantly publish a draft or unpublish an event from the public calendar with one click.
Tour.adminActionsContent: Use these tools to modify an event's details or remove it permanently from the system.
Tour.adminReportFiltersContent: Select the exact date range, event type, and status to include in your official report.
Tour.adminReportGenerateContent: Click here to render and download a formal, printable PDF document of the events ledger.
